overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the character V walking through a neon-lit covered commercial district in Night City at night. The character passes food carts and storefronts before stopping at a purple-lit food stall to interact with a vendor, then continues walking down the street past various neon signs and other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial pedestrian plaza with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza past a food cart and large planters

entered.detail: food cart with black umbrella and warm orange neon lighting
large round concrete planter with palm tree
illuminated sign for Watson Shopping center visible in the distance
overhead covered structure with exposed beams and lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered commercial plaza at night, passing a warmly lit food cart on the right and large concrete planters with palm trees. The area is illuminated by various neon storefront signs, with the Watson Shopping sign visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall with purple neon lighting and Japanese decor

events.description: character approaches and stops at the purple-lit food stall counter
character interacts with the vendor behind the food stall counter

agents.ego_description: standing at the food stall counter engaging with the vendor

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the counter preparing food and interacting with the character

entered.detail: food stall with bright purple neon underlighting and Japanese paper lanterns
large white paper lanterns with red patterns hanging above the counter
small lucky cat figurine sitting on the counter

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a distinctive food stall illuminated by vibrant purple neon and decorated with Japanese paper lanterns. The character stops at the counter to interact with the vendor, who is preparing food behind the counter where a small maneki-neko figurine sits.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial street with neon storefronts

events.description: character turns and walks away from the food stall continuing down the street

agents.ego_description: walking away from the food stall down the covered street past various storefronts

entered.detail: storefront with illuminated red OPEN sign in the window
tall building with prominent vertical red neon signage
elevated walkway or bridge structure crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the food stall and continues down the covered commercial street, passing storefronts with neon signs including one with a prominent OPEN sign. The street features scattered newspapers on the ground, an overhead bridge structure, and a tall building with vertical red neon lighting visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial plaza that transitions from a general stroll past storefronts to a focused interaction at a food stall before continuing down a bustling city street. It begins with the character walking past a warmly lit food cart and concrete planters with palm trees, moving toward the distant Watson Shopping sign. As the character approaches a vibrant purple-lit food stall decorated with Japanese paper lanterns, the camera slows to a stop for an interaction with a vendor beside a small maneki-neko figurine. The scene then shifts back into motion as the character walks away from the stall, passing an open storefront and scattered newspapers on the ground. Finally, the camera follows the character under an overhead bridge structure toward a tall building marked by vertical red neon lighting in the distance.
